title: BJP indulging in horse-trading to win Rajya Sabha election; former CM Naveen Patnaik
content:
The BJP is accused of engaging in "horse-trading."
*   This alleged activity is to secure victory in the Rajya Sabha election.
*   The accusation comes from former Chief Minister Naveen Patnaik.

title: Jeweller arrested in IDFC First Bank fraud case in Haryana; 12th arrest
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   A jeweller has been arrested in connection with a fraud case.
*   The case involves IDFC First Bank and occurred in Haryana.
*   This marks the 12th arrest in the ongoing investigation.

title: Govt. to take over Krishna Iyer’s residence to set up legal research centre: Minister
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The government plans to acquire Krishna Iyer's residence.
*   The property will be transformed into a legal research centre.
*   This initiative was announced by a Minister.

title: Experts laud A.P. CM’s vision for Quantum Valley project
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Experts have highly commended a new initiative.
*   The praise is directed at the A.P. Chief Minister's vision.
*   This vision specifically pertains to the Quantum Valley project.

title: International status for Madurai airport will draw more tourists, pilgrims, says Union Minister
content:
Madurai airport is set to gain international status.
*   This change is expected to attract a greater number of tourists and pilgrims.
*   A Union Minister has affirmed this positive impact, highlighting the potential for increased visitor numbers.

title: India at a crossroads, next step to define country’s future: Kamal Haasan
content:
Kamal Haasan asserts that India is currently at a crucial crossroads.
*   He emphasizes that the nation's immediate next steps are highly significant.
*   These forthcoming actions are set to define the country's future trajectory.

title: AQI-enabled bus services launched on Vijayawada-Bengaluru route
content:
New bus services have been launched on the Vijayawada-Bengaluru route.
*   These bus services are "AQI-enabled," meaning they incorporate Air Quality Index technology.
*   The technology is integrated into the services, likely for monitoring and potentially providing information about air quality.

title: Chief Minister M.K. Stalin meets Deva and Jiva, the child influencers who tell everyone to study
content:
Chief Minister M.K. Stalin held a meeting with Deva and Jiva.
*   Deva and Jiva are recognized as child influencers.
*   Their primary message and influence revolve around encouraging everyone to study.

title: Uttar Pradesh government makes ‘hyperbolic claims’ on employment, says Samajwadi Party
content:
The Samajwadi Party has accused the Uttar Pradesh government of making 'hyperbolic' claims.
*   These allegations specifically concern the government's figures and statements on employment.
*   The opposition party asserts that the UP government's employment claims are exaggerated.

title: Coffee-table book on wildlife of Tamil Nadu launched
content:
A new coffee-table book has been launched.
*   The book's central theme is wildlife.
*   It specifically focuses on the wildlife found in Tamil Nadu.
